memoryArtifacts.headline: My 15th GGF< Sir Roger Drury (died 1420), of Thurston and Rougham in Suffolk, was an English landowner, soldier, administrator and politician
memoryArtifacts.description:
Born before 1363, he was the son and heir of Sir Nicholas Drury, of Thurston, and his wife Joan, daughter of Sir Simon Saxham, of Saxham in Suffolk.

The Drury family had settled at Thurston before 12 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Drury於1419年出生在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德時，他的父親Nicholas Drury55歲，母親Joan Hethe23歲。他於1454年與Felice Denston在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1493年1月31日在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍斯亞德享年74歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Drury于1419年出生在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德时，他的父亲Nicholas Drury55岁，母亲Joan Hethe23岁。他于1454年与Felice Denston在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1493年1月31日在英国英格兰素福爾可霍斯亞德享年74岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Drury was born in 1419, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, his father, Nicholas Drury, was 55 and his mother, Joan Hethe, was 23. He married Felice Denston in 1454, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 31 January 1493, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Hawstead, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Drury est né en 1419, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Drury, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Joan Hethe, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Felice Denston en 1454, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 31 janvier 1493, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Drury 1419 in Hawstead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Drury 55 und seine Mutter Joan Hethe 23. Er hat 1454 in Hawstead, Suffolk, England Felice Denston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Januar 1493 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hawstead, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Drury è nato il nel 1419 nel Hawstead, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Drury, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Joan Hethe, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Felice Denston nel 1454, nel Hawstead, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 31 gennaio 1493, nel Hawstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Hawstead, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Druryが1419年にイギリススフォルクハウステアドで生まれた時，父Nicholas Druryは55歳，母Joan Hetheは23歳であった。1454年にイギリススフォルクハウステアドでFelice Denstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1493年1月31日にイギリスイギリススフォルクハウステアドで74歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクハウステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Drury(이)가 1419년 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Drury(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Hethe(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1454년 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에서 Felice Denston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 1월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호스테아드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Drury nasceu em 1419, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Drury, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hethe, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Felice Denston em 1454, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1493, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Drury родился в 1419 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Drury было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hethe, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Felice Denston в 1454 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 31 января 1493 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Drury nació en 1419, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Drury, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Joan Hethe, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Felice Denston en 1454, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 31 de enero de 1493, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
